title: SharePostRequest
description: Request body for sharing a post. Both `message` and `sharedOriginDiscussion` are required. Use `message = ""` for a reshare or a non-empty `message` for a quote share.

message.description: Required. Set to `""` (empty string) for a reshare, or to the commentary text for a quote share. Cannot be null or omitted.

sharedOriginDiscussion.description: Required. ID of the post being shared.

sharedDiscussionId.description: Optional. Only set this when `sharedOriginDiscussion` itself points to a share — it identifies the intermediate share, so the created Post's `metadata.share.sharedPost` is set to this post and `metadata.share.sharedOriginPost` to `sharedOriginDiscussion`, collapsing the chain to a 2-level reference in subsequent reads. Leave unset for first-level shares.
